name: Inmon 3NF vs Kimball Star: Build Both
description: Implement the same business requirement using both the Inmon (3NF) and Kimball (star schema) approaches

checks.name: inmon_transactions has 5 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM inmon_transactions;
checks.description: All 5 source transactions must be in the Inmon transactions table

checks.name: kimball_fact_sales has 5 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM kimball_fact_sales;
checks.description: All 5 source transactions must be in the Kimball fact table

checks.name: Inmon view: Brazil total = 2150
checks.query: SELECT total_amount FROM v_inmon_by_country WHERE country = 'Brazil';

checks.name: Kimball view: Brazil total = 2150
checks.query: SELECT total_amount FROM v_kimball_by_country WHERE country = 'Brazil';
checks.description: Both views should return identical results for Brazil

checks.name: inmon_transactions has 2 FKs
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM duckdb_constraints() WHERE table_name = 'inmon_transactions' AND constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY';
checks.description: inmon_transactions must have FK to inmon_customers and inmon_products
